things.name: Kakadu National Park
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage park with Aboriginal rock art, crocodiles and waterfalls

things.name: Mindil Beach Sunset Market
things.description: Tropical sunset market with 200 stalls of food and crafts from May to October

things.name: Litchfield National Park
things.description: Spectacular waterfalls and swimming holes in a monsoon forest, closer than Kakadu

things.name: Crocosaurus Cove
things.description: City centre crocodile attraction with the Cage of Death underwater crocodile enclosure

things.name: Museum & Art Gallery NT
things.description: Cyclone Tracy memorial, Aboriginal art and natural history in the tropical city

things.name: Darwin Waterfront
things.description: Wave pool, harbour beaches and the WWII oil storage tunnels complex

things.name: Adelaide River Jumping Crocodiles
things.description: Saltwater crocodiles launched vertically from the water to take meat from poles

things.name: Darwin Military Museum
things.description: Comprehensive museum covering Darwin's role in World War II and the 1942 bombing

things.name: Tiwi Islands
things.description: Aboriginal cultural experience on Bathurst and Melville islands off Darwin's coast

things.name: George Brown Darwin Botanic Gardens
things.description: Tropical gardens with over 1,500 plant species, established in 1879
